title: Terms & Privacy Policy
intro: The Ramathibodi Surgical Society (RASS), under the Faculty of Medicine Ramathibodi Hospital, Mahidol University, is committed to protecting the personal data of all users in accordance with the Thailand Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (2019) (PDPA).

data_controller.title: 1. Data Controller
data_controller.content:
Ramathibodi Surgical Society (RASS)
Faculty of Medicine Ramathibodi Hospital
Mahidol University
270 Rama VI Road, Ratchathewi, Bangkok 10400

data_collected.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
data_collected.content: We collect the following categories of personal data:
items: Full name (Thai and English)
Student ID and academic information (track, year)
Date of birth
Email address
Phone number and LINE ID
Social media accounts
Interests and extracurricular portfolio
Event registration and participation records
Profile image (via Google Account)

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
purpose.content: Your personal data is processed for:
items: Managing event registrations, attendance, and reflections
Communicating event updates and society announcements
Academic tracking and portfolio management for members
Internal organisational administration and reporting
Maintaining records for institutional accountability

legal_basis.title: 4. Legal Basis
legal_basis.content: We rely on the following legal grounds:
items: Consent: For collecting and processing your profile data when you create or update your account.
Legitimate Interest: For event management and internal organisational operations.
Legal Obligation: For maintaining records as required by Mahidol University regulations.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: Personal data is retained for the duration of your membership and up to 5 years after graduation. Event registration data is retained for institutional reporting purposes. You may request earlier deletion by contacting the Data Controller.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: Under the PDPA, you have the following rights:
items: Right to access your personal data
Right to rectify inaccurate or incomplete data
Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
Right to data portability
Right to restrict or object to processing
Right to withdraw consent at any time
rights.footer: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at the address above or through the contact information provided below.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies & Authentication
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. These cookies are strictly necessary for the operation of the platform and cannot be disabled. No third-party tracking cookies are used.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.content:
For enquiries regarding your personal data or this policy, please contact:

Ramathibodi Surgical Society
Email: rass@mahidol.ac.th
